scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol && tsc --noEmit -p packages/transport-ws && tsc --noEmit -p packages/transport-mqtt && tsc --noEmit -p packages/transport-cloudsignal && tsc --noEmit -p packages/bridge && tsc --noEmit -p packages/pairing && tsc --noEmit -p packages/push && tsc --noEmit -p examples/echo && tsc --noEmit -p adapters/connector-openclaw && tsc --noEmit -p packages/app
scripts.build: npm run build -w @raccoon/protocol && npm run build -w @raccoon/transport-ws && npm run build -w @raccoon/pairing && npm run build -w @raccoon/push && npm run build -w @raccoon/bridge && npm run build -w @raccoon/connector-openclaw && npm run build -w @raccoon/app
